title: noise.candidate.evaluated v1
description: Emitted for every noise candidate that scores fitness > 0. Fitness is SSIM against the target instance reference render. Source: /autobench/noise_kernel.

fitness.description: SSIM against target instance reference render. 0=failure, 1.0=pixel-perfect. Note: single-instance evaluation only; multi-instance SSIM has arithmetic ceiling at (1+sum_pairwise_ssim)/N.

code_length.description: Character count of the evolved noise() function.

spectral_beta.description: RAPS power-law exponent beta estimated from the rendered image spectrum.

harmonic_ratio.description: Ratio of harmonic-peak power to total power in the RAPS spectrum.

raps_fitness.description: RAPS spectral oracle score: Gaussian membership in calibrated (beta, harmonic_ratio) class.

ssim_fallback.description: SSIM score used as fallback if spectral oracle fails or is unavailable.
